name: Nurture subscribers with Google Drive and Slack

parameters.text: =Thanks for your interest — here's a quick-start guide.

parameters.content:
### Daily Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — daily at 9:00. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Score the Lead

### Score the Lead

Custom JavaScript: Score each lead 0-100 from simple heuristics

Next: Assign Round-Robin Owner

### Assign Round-Robin Owner

Custom JavaScript: Round-robin owner assignment

Next: Route by Heat

### Route by Heat

Routes each item to one of 3 lanes: hot, warm + fallback.

Ports: ①→ Hot → Google Sheets + Instant Ping · ②→ Warm → Drip via Slack · ③→ Cold → Park in Nurture List

### Hot → Google Sheets + Instant Ping

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

Next: Notify Assigned Owner

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Hot → Google Sheets + Instant Ping

parameters.content:
### Notify Assigned Owner

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Combine Lead Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

### Warm → Drip via Slack

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Combine Lead Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

### Cold → Park in Nurture List

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Next: Combine Lead Paths

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Cold → Park in Nurture List

parameters.content:
### Combine Lead Paths

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

# Nurture subscribers with Google Drive and Slack

**Pattern:** Drip Sequence · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Nurture subscribers with Google Drive and Slack. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual routing is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Daily Schedule → Score the Lead → Assign Round-Robin Owner → Route by Heat → Hot → Google Sheets + Instant Ping → Notify Assigned Owner → Combine Lead Paths

## Use it for
- Teams that want to drip sequence without manual effort
- Anyone automating routing in sales
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Standardizes the process every time
- Scales without extra headcount
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2 / service account; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your routing process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
